articles.title: IBM has a time-series model for every task

articles.title: Toward a transparent supply chain for AI

articles.title: Quantum computers take a step into real materials science

articles.summary: llm-d offers a replicable blueprint for developers and researchers to deploy inference stacks for any model, on any accelerator, in any cloud.

articles.title: IBM’s Charles H. Bennett earns ACM Turing award

articles.title: IBM is working today to secure communication from tomorrow’s quantum risks
articles.summary: Cryptography researchers at IBM are working with researchers at secure messaging services Signal and Threema to help defend against future quantum computers that may be able to break much of the encryption the internet relies upon.
